hero.headline: Incredibly Reliable Plumbing When You Need It Most
hero.subheadline: Serving West Harrison and surrounding areas since 1976. Fast response, upfront pricing, no surprises on the bill.

stats.label: Minutes Average Response
stats.source: review-mined — multiple customers cited half-hour arrival

services.title: Toilet Repair & Installation
services.description: From leaks and clogs to full replacements, we fix toilet problems fast without leaving a mess. Our techs carry parts on the truck so most jobs are done same-day.
services.alt_text: Plumber in uniform installing a new toilet in a clean residential bathroom

services.title: Drain Cleaning
services.description: Clogged drains cleared quickly with professional equipment. We don't just push the blockage down — we clear it completely the first time.
services.alt_text: Plumber using drain snake equipment to clear a clogged kitchen sink

services.title: Pipe Repair
services.description: Leaky pipes, burst lines, or corrosion issues handled right away. We'll stop the leak, assess the damage, and give you a quote before we start any work.
services.alt_text: Close-up of plumber's hands repairing a copper pipe joint under a sink

services.title: Gas Line Service
services.description: Safe, code-compliant gas line installation and repair for appliances, water heaters, and heating systems. Licensed for residential and commercial work.
services.alt_text: Certified plumber installing gas line with pressure testing equipment visible

services.title: Faucets & Fixtures
services.description: Dripping faucets, broken handles, or full fixture upgrades installed cleanly and professionally. We'll match your existing style or help you pick something new.
services.alt_text: Plumber installing a modern chrome faucet in a residential kitchen

services.title: ADA Bathroom Renovations
services.description: Full accessible bathroom remodels designed for safety and independence. We handle the plumbing, fixtures, and layout — all work permitted and code-compliant.
services.alt_text: Completed ADA-compliant bathroom with grab bars and accessible shower installation

about.headline: Family-Owned Since 1976
about.bio: William E. Eckel started this company in West Harrison nearly 50 years ago with a simple belief: show up when you say you will, charge what you quote, and treat every home like it's your own. That's still how we operate. Our team has been serving the same families and neighborhoods for decades, and we're licensed, insured, and local.

testimonials.quote: I've used Eckel Plumbing several times and they have been incredibly reliable and timely.
testimonials.author: Brian Newport

testimonials.quote: The plumbers were beyond professional, honest and very, very reliable.
testimonials.author: Kriston

testimonials.quote: They sent the Kennedy boys within literally a half hour and handled the issue with ease.
testimonials.author: Emergency Call Customer

testimonials.quote: Phenomenal people to work with. Excellent communication and quick turnaround.
testimonials.author: Repeat Customer

testimonials.quote: Plumber Aaron wore shoe coverings, was on time, got the job done professionally.
testimonials.author: Residential Client

testimonials.quote: Everyone that came was very professional, knowledgeable, courteous, called to tell us when to expect them.
testimonials.author: Bathroom Remodel Client

why_us.headline: Upfront Pricing, No Surprises
why_us.description: We quote the job before we start. You'll know exactly what you're paying before any work begins. No hidden fees, no overtime charges.

why_us.headline: Fast Response When It Matters
why_us.description: We answer the phone and we show up fast. Most emergency calls get a tech on-site within 30 minutes. Plumbing problems don't wait — neither do we.

why_us.headline: Clean, Professional Service
why_us.description: Our techs wear shoe covers, clean up after every job, and treat your home with respect. You won't find a mess when we're done.

why_us.headline: Licensed, Insured, Local
why_us.description: We've been serving West Harrison and the surrounding area since 1976. Fully licensed and insured, with decades of experience you can trust.

cta_section.headline: Plumbing Problem? We're Here to Help.
cta_section.subtext: Call us now or schedule a visit online. Same-day service available.

footer.tagline: Fast, honest plumbing you can count on.
